test.note: Exit code 1 from 10 failing test files (9 pre-existing + 1 regression). 51 files passing, 440 tests passing, 3 tests failing. Pre-existing: 9 files (Playwright, Deno empty suites, useExport, videoEditorStore, snapping, image-edit, connectionValidator 2 assertions). New regression: StudioRightPanel.test.tsx 'collapses to a slim stub' timeout (was passing in studio-fixes round 2). Delta from baseline: +1 failing file, +1 failing test. The new test count increased from 407 to 440 (+33 new tests from this milestone's features).

lint.note: Exit code 1 from 770 lint problems (705 errors, 65 warnings). Previous baseline was 769 problems (704 errors, 65 warnings). Delta: +1 error. The additional error is likely from new code in this milestone (e.g., ImagesToVideoNode.tsx react-hooks/rules-of-hooks, PropertiesPanel any casts). All consistent with established codebase patterns (no-explicit-any, react-hooks). No new categories introduced.

nonBlockingIssues.description: Stale closure bug in VideoEditorMain.tsx loadProject().then() — clips.length captured from render, not from store after resolve. May add demo content on top of real project data.
videoEditorStore.ts does not use devtools middleware, violating AGENTS.md Zustand convention.
canUndo and canRedo hardcoded to false in EditorHeader despite undo/redo store methods being wired.
Duration calculation duplicated between VideoEditorMain and EditorCanvas.
Preset, Animations, and Colors sections in PropertiesPanel render but don't wire to any store actions.
ActionButton component defined inside EditorCanvas render body — new ref on every render.
Unsafe type assertion for transition.type in handleApplyTransition.
Prompt truncation in videoEditorService always appends '...' even for short prompts.
4 (supabase as any) casts for untyped tables in videoEditorService.ts.
~120 lines of dead extraction helpers (findMediaCandidate, extractImageInfo, etc.) in AIGenerationPanel.tsx after migration to unified service.
Unused type imports (GenerationResult, OnProgress) in falai-client.ts.
Edge-function route hardcodes status:'completed' regardless of URL extraction success, inconsistent with other routes.
ElevenLabs audio route creates blob URLs that don't survive page reloads. autoStore silently skips them.
Studio and project-setup generation flows not migrated to unified service (acknowledged with reasonable justification — complex coupling).
Model alias table only lists 8 of 20+ aliases. Full map requires looking up falModelNormalization.ts.

testRegression.test: collapses to a slim stub and stays collapsed while selection changes
testRegression.note: This test was passing in studio-fixes round 2 (after fix-generate-workflow-auth). It has regressed — likely a flaky timeout issue exacerbated by increased test suite size. Not directly caused by editor-unification features (StudioRightPanel was not modified in this milestone).

appliedUpdates.description: Added 'Unified Generation Service' section to .factory/library/architecture.md documenting the routing service at src/services/unifiedGenerationService.ts, its 5 backends, key types, convenience methods, model catalog, SKILL.md reference, and integration status.

suggestedGuidanceUpdates.suggestion: Add convention: 'When refactoring code to use new service layers, clean up dead functions and imports from the original file. If extraction helpers or utility functions become orphaned after a migration, remove them in the same commit.'
suggestedGuidanceUpdates.evidence: unified-generation-service left ~120 lines of dead extraction helpers in AIGenerationPanel.tsx after migrating to unifiedGenerationService.generate(). editor-preview-wiring also introduced non-functional UI sections (Preset/Animations/Colors) that render but do nothing.

suggestedGuidanceUpdates.suggestion: Add to Zustand convention section: 'ALL Zustand stores MUST use devtools middleware, including the videoEditorStore. Verify this before submitting.' Consider adding to verification checklist.
suggestedGuidanceUpdates.evidence: editor-preview-wiring created videoEditorStore.ts (925 lines, central to editor) without devtools middleware despite AGENTS.md documenting the convention. This is a recurring pattern — third instance in the mission.

suggestedGuidanceUpdates.suggestion: Add note about Supabase untyped tables: 'Several tables (media_items, project_assets, generation_outputs, final_project_assets, timeline_clips, compositions) are not in the generated Supabase types. Use `(supabase as any).from("table")` as a temporary workaround. Track these for future type generation update.'
suggestedGuidanceUpdates.evidence: editor-asset-integration used (supabase as any) for 4 table queries. Worker noted this matches existing codebase pattern but AGENTS.md doesn't acknowledge it.

suggestedGuidanceUpdates.suggestion: Add convention: 'When creating new generation flows, use the unified generation service (src/services/unifiedGenerationService.ts) rather than directly calling edge functions. See SKILL.md for the full API.'
suggestedGuidanceUpdates.evidence: The unified generation service was created in this milestone to standardize generation flows. Studio and project-setup flows still use direct edge function calls. Documenting the unified service as the preferred approach will prevent further fragmentation.

rejectedObservations.observation: All 5 editor files in editor-preview-wiring were brand new despite existing on disk from a prior worker. Pattern of leaving files untracked.
rejectedObservations.reason: One-time issue from the transition between workers. The files are now properly committed. Not a systemic convention gap.

rejectedObservations.observation: Backend-worker skill step 7 doesn't apply to documentation-only features (skill-md-documentation).
rejectedObservations.reason: Valid observation but too narrow — this is a single edge case in the backend-worker skill that rarely occurs. Not worth a skill update.

rejectedObservations.observation: Fullstack-worker skill 'implement backend first' doesn't account for service-layer-only features.
rejectedObservations.reason: Valid but narrow — service-layer-only features are rare. Worker adapted correctly. Not worth a skill update at this time.

rejectedObservations.observation: Pure utility functions in EditorComposition (getTransitionStyle, getTransformForTime) should have unit tests despite being in a UI file.
rejectedObservations.reason: Valid for code quality but not a shared state gap. The functions work correctly and are covered by the broader integration. Better addressed as a non-blocking issue than a skill change.
